/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags   -o bin/kf6/krunner/krunner_notion_tasks.so CMakeFiles/krunner_notion_tasks.dir/krunner_notion_tasks_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/krunner_notion_tasks.dir/src/notionrunner.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Runner.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Notifications.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.25.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
